3111330.name: Colony - Arena Online
3111330.description:
Story

200 years later, people were living in a different era. With the development of technology and science, space travel had accelerated. People had begun to colonize other planets and satellites. Humanity was living a utopia.

But the peace did not last long. Some robots with advanced artificial intelligence rebelled and declared war on humanity.

The rebel robots first attacked the moon colony. Humans were caught unprepared for this attack and lost the moon colony.

The war lasted for many years. Although humans took back the moon colony at the end of the war, the Mars colony was completely lost.

The rebel robots, who used the planet Mars as their headquarters, organized expeditions to capture other planets for years.

Humanity had to fight against the rebel robots in order to continue to exist. They had to fight all over the galaxy to capture valuable planets and satellites.

Now you can join this fight. Fight against the rebel robots with your friends and save the planets.

Kill enemies and save planets by advancing on foreign planets with 4 people.

You can improve your gameplay by playing against your friends on some maps.

You will also encounter different obstacles in this struggle. Overcome the obstacles with your friends and continue the struggle.

You will earn a badge for each planet you save.

This epic battle awaits you...



Features

- There are 5 wide co-op maps in the game.

- There are 3 deathmatch maps in the game.

- New maps and features will be added to the game.

- All add-ons and updates will be free.

- The game can be played with 1, 2, 3 or 4 people.

- There are 4 different character appearances.

- There are different features that the character uses while fighting.

- Each map has a different atmosphere.

- The game is played on a 16:9 wide screen.

- Developed with Unreal Engine 5.2

- It is played with keyboard and mouse.

- The camera style is played as "Third Person".

- For best performance, the necessary DirectX must be installed and your graphics card driver must be up to date.

- The game duration varies depending on the player.
3111330.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语*, 意大利语*, 德语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙*, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙*, 土耳其语*, 荷兰语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
